title: E21S's Copper upgrade
description: The mod allows you to upgrade your tools with copper, making copper a more sought after resource
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/67llKPlqKRU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>**The mod allows you to upgrade your tools with copper, making copper a more sought after resource. To upgrade a tool, you need to find a structure called a blocked passage, dig it up and find a treasure chest containing a copper rune. Also, to upgrade, you need to melt a copper ingot in a furnace to get molten copper. Using a copper rune and molten copper on a blacksmith's table, you can upgrade any of your tools, making them much more efficient.**


The official E21S author page and the latest mod versions are only available on modrinth. I am not responsible for other sources and the files they post under the guise of my mods.
